records.question: Which parties have addresses in Colorado?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
JOIN addresses ON party_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.state_province_county = 'Colorado'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Parties.party_id
FROM Parties
JOIN Party_Addresses ON Parties.party_id = Party_Addresses.party_id
JOIN Addresses ON Party_Addresses.address_id = Addresses.address_id
WHERE Addresses.state_province_county = 'Colorado'

records.question: Who are the parties with email alanna.boehm@example.net and phone 529-074-5348 that pay by Cheque and have a Residence address that was valid since at least 2016-05-24 08:11:04 and ended exactly on 2018-03-04 08:34:45?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
WHERE party_addresses.date_address_from >= '2016-05-24 08:11:04' AND parties.party_email = 'alanna.boehm@example.net' AND party_addresses.address_type_code = 'Residence' AND party_addresses.date_address_to = '2018-03-04 08:34:45' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Cheque' AND parties.party_phone = '529-074-5348'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Parties.party_id
FROM Parties
JOIN Party_Addresses ON Parties.party_id = Party_Addresses.party_id
WHERE Parties.party_email = 'alanna.boehm@example.net'
  AND Parties.party_phone = '529-074-5348'
  AND Parties.payment_method_code = 'Cheque'
  AND Party_Addresses.address_type_code = 'Residence'
  AND Party_Addresses.date_address_from <= '2016-05-24 08:11:04'
  AND Party_Addresses.date_address_to = '2018-03-04 08:34:45'

records.question: Which parties pay with cash, have the phone number (919)169-1514x55820 and email erick.mills@example.com, and had an address in Cletusbury, Georgia, USA starting from at least 2017-02-07 02:51:33 and ending exactly 2018-02-27 09:21:41?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
JOIN addresses ON party_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE parties.party_phone = '(919)169-1514x55820' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Cash' AND parties.party_email = 'erick.mills@example.com' AND addresses.country = 'USA' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Georgia' AND party_addresses.date_address_from >= '2017-02-07 02:51:33' AND party_addresses.date_address_to = '2018-02-27 09:21:41' AND addresses.town_city = 'Cletusbury'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Parties.party_id
FROM Parties
JOIN Party_Addresses ON Parties.party_id = Party_Addresses.party_id
JOIN Addresses ON Party_Addresses.address_id = Addresses.address_id
WHERE Parties.payment_method_code = 'cash'
  AND Parties.party_phone = '(919)169-1514x55820'
  AND Parties.party_email = 'erick.mills@example.com'
  AND Addresses.town_city = 'Cletusbury'
  AND Addresses.state_province_county = 'Georgia'
  AND Addresses.country = 'USA'
  AND Party_Addresses.date_address_from <= '2017-02-07 02:51:33'
  AND Party_Addresses.date_address_to = '2018-02-27 09:21:41'

records.question: Which parties pay by Direct Debit, have phone number 186-726-9855, have Work In Progress forms that started no later than 2017-12-04 18:20:10 and were fully completed on or after 2018-01-31 17:09:32, and have services with a service date exactly on 2018-03-08 23:52:44 that were booked by 2018-03-25 12:56:09?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_forms ON parties.party_id = party_forms.party_id
JOIN party_services ON parties.party_id = party_services.customer_id
WHERE party_forms.form_status_code = 'Work In Progress' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit' AND parties.party_phone = '186-726-9855' AND party_forms.date_fully_completed >= '2018-01-31 17:09:32' AND party_services.booking_made_date <= '2018-03-25 12:56:09' AND party_forms.date_completion_started <= '2017-12-04 18:20:10' AND party_services.service_datetime = '2018-03-08 23:52:44'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Parties.party_id
FROM Parties
JOIN Party_Forms ON Parties.party_id = Party_Forms.party_id
JOIN Party_Services ON Parties.party_id = Party_Services.customer_id
WHERE Parties.payment_method_code = 'Direct Debit'
  AND Parties.party_phone = '186-726-9855'
  AND Party_Forms.form_status_code = 'Work In Progress'
  AND Party_Forms.date_completion_started <= '2017-12-04 18:20:10'
  AND Party_Forms.date_fully_completed >= '2018-01-31 17:09:32'
  AND Party_Services.service_datetime = '2018-03-08 23:52:44'
  AND (Party_Services.booking_made_date IS NULL OR Party_Services.booking_made_date <= '2018-03-25 12:56:09')

records.question: Which parties have the payment method Credit Card, the email daniel.charity@example.net, and started completing their form on or after 2017-12-04 16:57:31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
JOIN party_forms ON parties.party_id = party_forms.party_id
WHERE party_forms.date_completion_started >= '2017-12-04 16:57:31' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card' AND parties.party_email = 'daniel.charity@example.net'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Parties.party_id
FROM Parties
JOIN Party_Forms ON Parties.party_id = Party_Forms.party_id
WHERE Parties.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card'
  AND Parties.party_email = 'daniel.charity@example.net'
  AND Party_Forms.date_completion_started >= '2017-12-04 16:57:31'
